sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_events (event_time TIMESTAMP, duration INTERVAL, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_events VALUES (current_time, INTERVAL '5 HOUR', 'Event A'), (current_time, INTERVAL '3 HOUR', 'Event B');
SELECT event_time, duration, description, (event_time - duration) AS end_time FROM test_events WHERE (event_time - INTERVAL '1 HOUR') IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE event_statistics AS SELECT description, COUNT(*) AS occurrence FROM test_events GROUP BY description HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;

SELECT event_time, duration, description FROM test_events JOIN event_statistics ON test_events.description = event_statistics.description WHERE event_statistics.occurrence > 1 ORDER BY (current_time - event_time);
WITH RecentEvents AS (SELECT event_time, duration FROM test_events WHERE (current_time - event_time) < INTERVAL '10 HOUR') SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RecentEvents;
SELECT * FROM test_events WHERE event_time = (SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM test_events) - INTERVAL '2 HOUR';
SELECT description, (current_time - MIN(event_time)) AS time_since_first_event FROM test_events GROUP BY description HAVING (time_since_first_event) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_events AS SELECT event_time - INTERVAL '30 MINUTE' AS adjusted_time, description FROM test_events;
SELECT adjusted_time, description FROM temp_events WHERE adjusted_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY adjusted_time DESC;
